title: Test: Reflexivity in Financial Markets
summary: The concept of reflexivity suggests that participants' perceptions actively shape the reality they're trying to predict, creating feedback loops that traditional models fail to capture.

title: Test: Understanding Volatility Surface Dynamics
summary: A deep dive into how implied volatility surfaces move and deform in response to market events. Examining the relationship between skew, term structure, and underlying price action.

title: Hello, World!
summary: My first blog post! I wanted to write out some of my thoughts on why I think maintaining a blog is a productive use of time, and what I intend to do with my corner of the internet.
